paper_statement: In the 12-position, 4-beacon RingWorld PPO experiment, direct ALF converges faster than direct LOF, and fully learned Deep ALF outperforms S5 at equal hidden size 12; S5 hidden size 256 approaches Deep ALF.

minimum_full_credit_protocol.environment: paper-exact 12-state RingWorld with all four action transitions, beacon angles, rewards, resets, and episode length
minimum_full_credit_protocol.uncertainty: seed-level raw curves and confidence or standard-deviation summaries

invalid_substitutions: generic RNN in place of S5
verdict_rule: VERIFIED or FALSIFIED requires full protocol training from a uniquely specified implementation. Otherwise the result is BLOCKED.
